entities.description: The amount of oil in the seeds of groundnut.

entities.description: A breeding approach using genomic information to combine multiple traits faster.

entities.description: Populations used for genetic mapping of traits.

entities.description: A genotyping platform used to develop genetic maps.

entities.description: A genotyping platform used to develop genetic maps.

entities.name: GENETIC MAPS
entities.description: Maps showing the relative positions of marker loci on chromosomes.

entities.name: QUANTITATIVE TRAIT LOCUS ANALYSIS
entities.description: A method used to identify genomic regions associated with quantitative traits.

entities.name: QOC-A10
entities.description: A major QTL identified for oil content.

entities.name: QOC-A02
entities.description: A major QTL identified for oil content.

entities.name: PHENOTYPIC VARIANCE EXPLAINED
entities.description: A measure of the proportion of phenotypic variation explained by a QTL.

entities.description: A specific fatty acid analyzed in groundnut oil.

entities.description: A specific fatty acid analyzed in groundnut oil.

entities.description: A mutant allele affecting palmitic, oleic, and linoleic acid levels.

entities.name: AHFAD2A
entities.description: A mutant allele affecting palmitic, oleic, and linoleic acid levels.

entities.name: QTL CLUSTERS

entities.name: LINKAGE GROUPS
